{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Elder-spawned
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Elder-spawned]] is a term used to describe certain individuals like [[Kamba Nomen]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|An [[Elder-spawned]] creature can mimic [[Calder]]'s wife.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|"He’s a different breed of Elder-spawned filth," Maxwell had assured them.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
